description_long: This is a leafless deciduous tree with a thick, upright trunk and several sturdy, angular branches extending outward in various directions. The bark appears rough and textured, with a brownish hue typical of mature urban trees. The branches are irregularly spaced and fork at different heights, giving the tree a somewhat sparse and open silhouette. There are no visible leaves or foliage, suggesting it is either in a dormant winter state or is a stylized representation. The base of the trunk is slightly flared, providing stability, and there are no visible roots protruding from the ground. This tree would commonly be found in parks, along sidewalks, or in landscaped urban environments.
description: A leafless, brown deciduous tree with a thick trunk and several angular, sparsely arranged branches. The bark is rough and the overall silhouette is open and sparse.
description_view_0: The tree is seen from a side angle, showing the main trunk and several branches extending outward, with the shadow cast to the left.
description_view_1: A frontal view of the tree, highlighting the vertical alignment of the trunk and the branching pattern spreading symmetrically to both sides.
description_view_2: Another side view, similar to view 0 but from the opposite direction, showing the branches extending to the right and the shadow cast to the left.
description_view_3: A rear view of the tree, with the trunk and branches mostly aligned, and the shadow extending forward and to the left.
